items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for subscription status visibility.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the subscription status (active/paused/cancelled) is visible to the user. While there are successful prior steps indicating that customers can book offers and view their bookings, there is no direct evidence showing how subscription statuses are presented or managed in the system. The lack of specific checks or endpoints related to subscription status visibility leads to the conclusion that the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
